reviews.comment:
Solo cargué combustible. Muchos autos en la fila para cargar, pero con las 4 dársenas habilitadas me atendieron muy rápido. Se puede pagar con casi todas las tarjetas. Tienen serviclub.

(Translated by Google)
I just filled up with gas. There were a lot of cars in line, but with the four bays open, they served me very quickly. You can pay with almost any card. They have a service club.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLMGJ6b01nEAE

reviews.comment:
Malísimo momento pasamos acá con mí compañera de viaje, compramos en el shop, fuimos al sanitario y el dueño/gerente nos echó! Diciéndonos que el no tiene porqué atender al turista, q solo al cliente del ACA atiende! Nunca más .

(Translated by Google)
My travel companion and I had a terrible time here. We shopped at the store, went to the bathroom, and the owner/manager kicked us out! He told us he didn't have to serve tourists, that he only served ACA customers! Never again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLLXViNmJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
El automovil club es lo mejor del pais muy completo y siempre le dan una mano al socio y el servicio de auxilio es muy rapido en 15 esta en tu casa le doy 10 estrellas

(Translated by Google)
The automobile club is the best in the country, very comprehensive, and they always lend a hand to their members. The roadside assistance service is very fast; they're at your house in 15 minutes. I give it 10 stars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLZ3BYRGhRRRAB
